title: Coffee Gear Reviews, Comparisons, and Buying Guides
description: A category hub for coffee gear linking review pages, best lists, and informational guides.
intro: This hub keeps the site's main niche organized around coffee gear. Use it to move from broad category interest into the pages with the strongest commercial intent: best lists, comparison pages, and individual reviews that answer the last buying questions before checkout.

faq.question: Why have a coffee gear category page at all?
faq.answer: It groups the key informational and commercial pages together so readers and search engines can move through the topic cluster more clearly.

faq.question: What should readers click first from the coffee gear hub?
faq.answer: Most readers should open the category best-list page first, then validate finalists with reviews and comparison pages.
